## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Docs artifacts regenerated (if applicable)

## Accessibility impact

Describe any impact on keyboard flow, screen-reader announcements, focus
behavior, or related accessibility surfaces.

## Risks / follow-ups

List any known risks, edge cases, or follow-up work.
